scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,USER,HR,CRM,FLEET,ASSETS" --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgRed,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgWhite,bgGray" "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-management-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/hr-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/sales-crm-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/fleet-management-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/fixed-assets-service"
